arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate was lucky to remain on the pitch after a clumsy challenge against PSG - but the imperious Liverpool star made the most of his massive let-off, writes LEWIS STEELE
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Arne Slot has been in the news recently for allegedly telling a referee 'I'll f***ing blame you' if Liverpool don't go on to win the Premier League .

arts.ttl: ‘It’s a red card and a penalty’ – PSG’s Luís Campos left fuming by Ibrahima Konaté’s unpunished tackle
arts.sum: “It’s a red card and a penalty” exclaimed Luís Campos as the referees returned to the dressing room at half-time. The Paris Saint-Germain sporting director was referencing an incident in the…

arts.ttl: PSG chiefs CHASE Champions League referee down tunnel after Liverpool red card controversy
arts.sum: Sporting director Luis Campos was enraged with Davide Massa for letting Ibrahima Konate off the hook

arts.ttl: David Beckham's face says it all as Liverpool shock PSG in the Champions League
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and PSG midfielder David Beckham was unsure what he was witnessing as Liverpool produced a smash and grab at Parc des Princes

arts.ttl: Alisson on heroics vs. PSG: Best game of my life
arts.sum: Alisson has said his outstanding display in goal that helped Liverpool earn an unlikely 1-0 win over PSG on Wednesday was possibly the best performance of his life.

arts.ttl: Liverpool hero Alisson makes 'best of my life' admission after stunning PSG heroics
arts.sum: Liverpool landed an incredible win in Paris with Alisson the star man as the Brazilian No 1 produced, what he claimed, was the best performance of his life to deny PSG

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher labels Liverpool's win over PSG 'one of the biggest robberies' in football - as he insists Alisson's display will be 'remembered for years'
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has claimed Liverpool's last-gasp win over PSG was 'one of the biggest robberies in football', as he lauded goalkeeper Alisson Becker's stunning display.

arts.ttl: Liverpool players react as Alisson produces 'performance of my life' in Champions League win over PSG
arts.sum: The Reds number one was in sensational form against PSG

arts.ttl: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia’s Performance for PSG vs Liverpool Shows Why Arne Slot Wanted Him
arts.sum: Liverpool were considering Khvicha Kvaratskhelia as a Mohamed Salah replacement and he justified their interest in PSG's loss.

arts.ttl: 'Never': Arne Slot makes big claim about Alisson immediately after Liverpool's 1-0 Champions League win vs PSG
